title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code explains Pi Agent, an agent framework that can be harnessed in unique ways. The video compares Pi against frontier agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, discussing how harness layers become more complex as products add features.
